movies.title: Neon Harbor
movies.synopsis: A harbor patrol officer uncovers a smuggling ring that uses the night ferry schedule as cover.

movies.title: Paper Planets
movies.synopsis: Two siblings build a homemade planetarium that turns their town fair into an unexpected quest.

movies.title: Midnight Tram
movies.synopsis: Strangers riding the last tram of the night realize they are all chasing the same missing person case.

movies.title: Cosmic Laughs
movies.synopsis: A washed-up astronaut joins a galactic variety show and accidentally becomes Earth's last diplomat.
